# eval-hub

> eval-hub is a Kubernetes component. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 8080. connecting to external services: etcd, grpc, postgres, s3. runtime dependencies: MLflow, OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, S3, ame, kubernetes. exposing 59 Prometheus metrics. Python k8s client with 1 API call(s). integrates with Kueue via labels/annotations. references components: mlflow (config, import).
